'''fafara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placarder|placarder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placarder|placarder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fafara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæfæræth|fæfæræth]] || [[word:fæfæræj|fæfæræj]] || [[word:fæfæræsh|fæfæræsh]] || [[word:fæfæræ|fæfæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fafafarath|fafafarath]] || [[word:fafafaraj|fafafaraj]] || [[word:fafafarash|fafafarash]] || [[word:fafafara|fafafara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fafarath|fafarath]] || [[word:fafaraj|fafaraj]] || [[word:fafarash|fafarash]] || [[word:fafara|fafara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fafafrath|fafafrath]] || [[word:fafafraj|fafafraj]] || [[word:fafafrash|fafafrash]] || [[word:fafafraf|fafafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fafaratha|fafaratha]] || [[word:fafaraja|fafaraja]] || [[word:fafarasha|fafarasha]] || [[word:fafaraka|fafaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fafarath|fafarath]] || [[word:fafaraj|fafaraj]] || [[word:fafarash|fafarash]] || [[word:fafara|fafara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fafarathal|fafarathal]] || [[word:fafarajal|fafarajal]] || [[word:fafarashal|fafarashal]] || [[word:fafarakal|fafarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fafarathatha|fafarathatha]] || [[word:fafarajaja|fafarajaja]] || [[word:fafarashasha|fafarashasha]] || [[word:fafaraka|fafaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fafarathan|fafarathan]] || [[word:fafarajan|fafarajan]] || [[word:fafarashan|fafarashan]] || [[word:fafarakan|fafarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fafarathaoro|fafarathaoro]] || [[word:fafarajaoro|fafarajaoro]] || [[word:fafarashaoro|fafarashaoro]] || [[word:fafarakaoro|fafarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
